text.title: C# .NET Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping team size + behaviour richness to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or sibling methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the feature have non-trivial business behaviour (state transitions, invariants)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: use flat feature folder per csharp-dotnet
adopt aggregate behaviour but skip MediatR — overhead exceeds benefit for solo work

branch.question: CQRS read/write split required (separate read models)?

conclusion.verdict: full clean-arch + MediatR command/query layout per 01-core-rules
clean-arch layers + MediatR handler-per-command but skip separate read models

text.example: behaviour=rich → team_size_gt_1=true → cqrs=true → full clean-arch + ShipOrderCommand + ShipOrderHandler + Order.Ship() aggregate method + ShipOrderValidator + ShipOrderResponse DTO.
